allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Near-Sensor Computing manuscript, Fig1 plotting scripts, and supporting materials *)
Bash(git commit --amend -m 'Initial commit: Near-Sensor Computing manuscript, Fig1 plotting scripts, and supporting materials *)
Bash(git commit -m 'refactor\(Fig1\): apply Nature Sensors publication-grade modifications *)
Bash(GIT_CURL_VERBOSE=1 GIT_TRACE=1 git push -u origin master)
